welcome.aiDesc: Natural conversations with books and characters
welcome.searchDesc: Find any concept in books precisely

f1.title: AI Reading Assistant
f1.desc: Direct conversation with book characters and viewpoints

f2.title: Semantic Search
f2.desc: Find any concept, not just keywords

f3.title: Bilingual Reading
f3.desc: Seamless split-screen translation for any text

welcome.title: Welcome to ReadAny
welcome.desc: Your intelligent reading companion. Let's set up the perfect reading environment.
welcome.subtitle: Your intelligent reading companion. Let's set up the perfect reading environment.

ai.title: AI Configuration
ai.desc: Set up your AI provider to enable smart dialogue and summarization.

appearance.title: Appearance & Language
appearance.desc: Choose ReadAny's display language and theme preferences.

sync.title: Cloud Sync
sync.desc: Keep your reading progress perfectly synced across devices via WebDAV.

translation.title: Translation Engine
translation.desc: Configure your preferred translation engine for seamless bilingual reading.

embedding.title: Smart Retrieval
embedding.desc: Configure vector model to enable powerful semantic search
embedding.localDesc: Runs completely offline on your device
embedding.remoteInfoDesc: Remote mode uses the embedding API of your configured AI provider. Please ensure you have configured an AI provider in the previous step.

complete.title: You're All Set!
complete.desc: All configurations are ready. You can modify these options anytime in Settings. Now you can import books, chat with AI, or start exploring!

addBook.title: Add Your First Book
addBook.desc: Click here to import EPUB, PDF, and other supported formats.

bookList.title: Your Library
bookList.desc: All your imported books will appear here. Click any book to start reading.

vectorize.title: Smart Vectorization
vectorize.desc: Build a semantic index for powerful AI search and chat.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Configure AI provider, translation engine, and more.

sync.title: Multi-Platform Sync
sync.desc: Choose WebDAV, S3, or LAN sync to keep your library in sync across devices. Supports QR code pairing for quick setup.

prevPage.title: Previous Page
prevPage.desc: Click or tap the left area to go to the previous page.

toolbar.title: Toggle Toolbar
toolbar.desc: Click or tap the center area to show/hide the toolbar. You can also hover at the top or bottom edge.

nextPage.title: Next Page
nextPage.desc: Click or tap the right area to go to the next page.

commandPalette.hint: Type to search settings and actions
